cards.title: Payment logic
cards.body: Payment behavior depends on hotel rules, market requirements, product setup, and the approved integration model.

cards.title: Confirmation
cards.body: The confirmation should preserve guest details, offer details, source attribution, and the operational information the hotel needs.

items.question: Does Wink support only room bookings?
items.answer: No. The Booking Engine strategy includes rooms, packages, add-ons, dining, spa, experiences, events, and inquiries where configured.

items.question: Is payment behavior always the same?
items.answer: No. Payment logic depends on the hotel setup and approved integration model.

items.question: Where should developers start?
items.answer: Start with the Docs overview, then request API access for implementation detail.

fields.heading: Ready to build with Wink?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
